utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: This sucks ! I did not know I had to stay up all night before I went to this stupid sleep clinic ! I am so tired !

emotion_cause.span: 1_This sucks ! I did not know I had to stay up all night before I went to this stupid sleep clinic ! I am so tired !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , Rach , I think you are handling that really well .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What do you mean , handling it ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Now , maybe I would have a problem with this if it was not for me and Joshua .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know , they are not gonna get married anyway !

emotion_cause.span: 9_they are not gonna get married anyway !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: They rushed into this thing so fast it is ridiculous !

emotion_cause.span: 12_They rushed into this thing so fast it is ridiculous !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And somewhere along the way , one of them is gonna realise what they have done and they are call the whole thing off .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am telling you , you are gonna be dancing at my wedding before you are dancing at theirs .

emotion_cause.span: 14_you are gonna be dancing at my wedding before you are dancing at theirs .
